data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. The main issue is correctness: the proposed token_usage log entry is session-scoped, while existing history already supports one session covering multiple beatIds, so later aggregation cannot recover accurate per-beat counts from those entries alone. The revised plan should include beat identity in persisted token usage records or another explicit beat-scoped attribution mechanism, then parse and aggregate from that source. Secondary cleanup: use one beat summary field name consistently for per-agent aggregates and ensure tests cover a multi-beat session so duplication is caught.
